translation: to be happy, to look forward
the remark, the comment, the annotation
to occur to, to come to mind
to be over the moon; to be very excited
the entry, the start, the initiation (often used in contexts like starting a job or a celebration for starting something)
the high school diploma (university entrance qualification)
to take care of, to handle, to complete
to turn off, to make up, to matter
to complement, to complete, to add
to limit (in time), to set a time limit
to exist; to pass (an exam); to insist
to visit, to inspect, to view
